name: adobepy
description: Shared Adobe desktop communication runtime for Python and DCC MCP adapters.

scripts.test:quick: npm run bridge:check && npm run protocol:check && npm run capabilities:check && npm run architecture:check && npm run stubs:check && npm run api:sources:validate && npm run api:coverage && npm run ir:validate && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:bridges: npm run test:cep && npm run test:uxp-bridge && npm run test:uxpdt
scripts.lint:python: python -m compileall -q python generators scripts && npm run protocol:check && npm run architecture:check && npm run stubs:check && npm run api:sources:validate
scripts.lint: npm run lint:python && npm run lint:typescript && npm run lint:rust
scripts.test:coverage: python -m coverage run scripts/run_python_tests.py && python -m coverage report --fail-under=90
scripts.test:all: npm run bridge:check && npm run test:bridges && npm run protocol:check && npm run capabilities:check && npm run architecture:check && npm run stubs:check && npm run api:sources:validate && npm run api:coverage && npm run ir:validate && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:rust
